allowed_findings.rationale: PRD-4.2-v2 is merged and the new scanner is intentionally detecting that WI-4.2.4 through WI-4.2.7 have not yet been materialized as live work-item files. Keep this finding baselined only until Issue Planner creates the bounded Quant Walker implementation WIs and PM reconciles WI-4.2.3 lifecycle state.

PRD-4.3 is merged and the new scanner is intentionally detecting that WI-4.3.1 through WI-4.3.4 have not yet been materialized as live work-item files. Keep this finding baselined only until Issue Planner creates the bounded Time Series Walker WIs.

The opentelemetry namespace package is declared in [project.optional-dependencies].telemetry as 'opentelemetry-api'. The PyPI package name differs from the Python import namespace due to the opentelemetry namespace package convention. The import is guarded by a try/except ImportError so the runtime degrades gracefully when the telemetry extras are not installed.

structlog is intentionally an optional dependency declared in [project.optional-dependencies].telemetry. It is imported conditionally with a try/except ImportError fallback to stdlib logging. Keeping it optional preserves the zero-dependency core runtime.

langgraph is declared in [project.optional-dependencies].agent. The LangGraph orchestration backend is an optional execution surface; the deterministic dispatch path in dispatch.py does not require it.

langchain-core is a transitive dependency of langgraph used in the LangGraph checkpointer. It should be promoted to an explicit entry in [project.optional-dependencies].agent when the LangGraph surface is production-ready.

pytest is declared in [project.optional-dependencies].dev. The agent_runtime/tests/ directory is a test surface co-located with the runtime package; its imports of pytest are expected and intentional.

anthropic is declared in [project.optional-dependencies].sdk. The import is guarded by _ensure_anthropic() which raises ImportError with an install hint when the package is absent. Keeping it optional preserves the zero-dependency core runtime; callers must install risk-manager[sdk] to use the anthropic_api backend.

pytest is declared in [project.optional-dependencies].dev. The agent_runtime/tests/ directory is a test surface co-located with the runtime package; its imports of pytest are expected and intentional.

PyYAML is declared in [project.optional-dependencies].dev, but its import namespace is `yaml`. The skills sync/check tooling is repository maintenance code under scripts/, so allowing the namespace-package mismatch in the drift baseline keeps dependency hygiene focused on net-new undeclared tooling imports.
